message:
feat: Add subprocess and collections.abc `import *` support

- Add subprocess to runtime.Lib (guarded for freestanding)
- Add subprocess `import *` handler (11 exports: PIPE, STDOUT, DEVNULL, etc.)
- Add collections.abc `import *` handler (25 exports: Iterable, Container, etc.)
- Fix subprocess.zig: var → const for unmutated variables

This follows the established pattern for star import expansion.
